name: PT Samindo Resources Tbk
summary: PT Samindo Resources Tbk, through its subsidiaries, provides coal and other mining services primarily in Indonesia. Its activities include overburden removal, coal getting, coal hauling, and geological mapping and drilling. The company was formerly known as PT Myoh Technology, Tbk and changed its name to PT Samindo Resources Tbk in February 2012. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia. Samindo Resources Tbk is a subsidiary of ST International Corporation.
